title: Go go go, almost at 400k!🚀🚀🚀
author: Dramatic_Jackfruit57
selftext:
Hello everyone, I'm not trying to brag, but rather to share my journey from losses to profits.

Initially, I blindly chased after hot stocks without any trading plan. Buying at a high price and then panicking and selling when the price falls can quickly lead to heavy losses in an account. It was during that time that I realized the market is not a place to make money by luck, without methods and discipline, it is difficult to survive in the long run.

Later I changed my strategy. I no longer blindly chase popular stocks, but instead focus on small-cap stocks that have shown a clear upward trend. I combined daily charts, weekly charts, and moving averages to assess market trends, and I would only choose to open a position after confirming that the stock price had broken through a key resistance level.

I also spent a lot of time finding courses through various channels and organizing my entire process, from stock selection logic to exit strategy.

If you are also passionate about investing in stocks, we can exchange ideas and discuss them together! 🤝

If there are any mistakes, please do not criticize or attack, because everyone's trading philosophy and methods are different. 🙏

comments.author: Optimal_Emu3624
comments.body: Stocks, nah. Larry fink and all the 1% are gonna make everything tokenized very soon, and every company and their mother will be attempting digital. They are attempting to take the de out of defi. Theory is no new token that is created after day zero-when all companies will need to have the mark, (insert random token here)  to do business in the brave new world, will ever be defined again. Powers that be are already whitelisting wallets they deem worthy. The grandfathered in contracts I think will be the final thorn in “the man’s” side so to speak. Probably just a fever dream, not financial advice and all that shite… lol
